sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_results(
                $wpdb->prepare(
                    "
				SELECT DISTINCT YEAR( post_date ) AS year, MONTH( post_date ) AS month
				FROM $wpdb->posts
				WHERE post_type = %s
				$extra_checks
				ORDER BY post_date DESC
			",
                    $post_type
                )
            )

$wpdb->get_results(
            "SELECT * FROM " . APBCT_TBL_WC_SPAM_ORDERS . " WHERE id = '$id' LIMIT 1",
            OBJECT
        )

" . __('Spam protection by CleanTalk', 'cleantalk-spam-protect') . "

wp_die( "

" . __('Spam protection by CleanTalk', 'cleantalk-spam-protect') . "

" . $ct_result->comment . "

", '', array( 'response' => 403, "back_link" => true, "text_direction" => 'ltr' ) )

wp_send_json_error(array( 'html' => '

Sample Form

' . $ct_result->comment . '

' ))

wp_die( "

" . __( 'Spam protection by CleanTalk', 'cleantalk-spam-protect' ) . "

" . $ct_result->comment . "

", '', array('response' => 403, "back_link" => true, "text_direction" => 'ltr') )

printf(
                            esc_html__('JavaScript library (Bot Detector) is %s', 'cleantalk-spam-protect'),
                            apbct__is_bot_detector_enabled()
                                ? esc_html__('enabled', 'cleantalk-spam-protect')
                                : esc_html__('disabled', 'cleantalk-spam-protect')
                        )

printf( "

" . __( "Please, enter the %splugin settings%s in main site dashboard.", 'cleantalk-spam-protect' ) . "

", '', "" )

printf( '
Debug:
', md5($apbct->api_key), $apbct->stats['sfw']['update_period'], time() + 60 )

wp_die( "

" . __('Spam protection by CleanTalk', 'cleantalk-spam-protect') . "

" . $ct_result->comment . "

", '', array( 'response' => 403, "back_link" => true, "text_direction" => 'ltr' ) )

$wpdb->get_results(
                $wpdb->prepare(
                    "
				SELECT DISTINCT YEAR( post_date ) AS year, MONTH( post_date ) AS month
				FROM $wpdb->posts
				WHERE post_type = %s
				$extra_checks
				ORDER BY post_date DESC
			",
                    $post_type
                )
            )

printf(
                    "<option %s value='%s'>%s</option>\n",
                    selected( $m, $year . $month, false ),
                    esc_attr( $arc_row->year . $month ),
                    /* translators: 1: Month name, 2: 4-digit year. */
                    sprintf( __( '%1$s %2$d' ), $wp_locale->get_month( $month ), $year )
                )
printf( "%s\n", esc_url( remove_query_arg( 'attachment-filter', add_query_arg( 'mode', $mode ) ) ), implode( ' ', $classes ), $title )

printf( '%s%s', esc_url( add_query_arg( array( 'p' => $post_id, 'comment_status' => 'approved', ), admin_url( 'edit-comments.php' ) ) ), $approved_comments_number, $pending_comments ? $approved_phrase : $approved_only_phrase )
printf( '%s%s', $approved_comments_number, $pending_comments ? __( 'No approved comments' ) : __( 'No comments' ) )
printf( '%s%s', esc_url( add_query_arg( array( 'p' => $post_id, 'comment_status' => 'moderated', ), admin_url( 'edit-comments.php' ) ) ), $pending_comments_number, $pending_phrase )
printf( '%s%s', $pending_comments_number, $approved_comments ? __( 'No pending comments' ) : __( 'No comments' ) )
wp_die(esc_html__('Security check failed. Please try again.', 'cleantalk-spam-protect'), 403)
wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have sufficient permissions to perform this action.', 'cleantalk-spam-protect'), 403)
wp_die(esc_html__('Security check failed. Please try again.', 'cleantalk-spam-protect'), 403)
wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have sufficient permissions to perform this action.', 'cleantalk-spam-protect'), 403)
wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have sufficient permissions to perform this action.', 'cleantalk-spam-protect'), 403)

$wpdb->query($wpdb->prepare(
            "INSERT INTO " . APBCT_TBL_SESSIONS . " (id, value, last_update)
            VALUES (%s, %s, %s) 
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 
                value = VALUES(value),
                last_update = %s",
            $data['id'],
            $data['value'],
            date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),
            date('Y-m-d H:i:s')
        ))

wp_send_json(array(
                'success' => false,
                'error' => 'AltSessions: Internal JSON error:' . json_last_error_msg()))

wp_send_json(array(
                'success' => false,
                'error' => 'AltSessions: Internal JSON error: $cookies_array is null.'))

$wpdb->query(
                'DELETE FROM `' . $table . '`
                WHERE last_update < NOW() - INTERVAL ' . APBCT_SEESION__LIVE_TIME . ' SECOND
                OR last_update IS NULL
                LIMIT 100000;'
            )
wp_send_json_error(esc_html__('Error: Order ID is not valid.', 'cleantalk-spam-protect'))
wp_die(esc_html__('Security check failed. Please try again.', 'cleantalk-spam-protect'), 403)
wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have sufficient permissions to perform this action.', 'cleantalk-spam-protect'), 403)

$wpdb->get_results(
            "SELECT * FROM " . APBCT_TBL_WC_SPAM_ORDERS . " WHERE id = '$id' LIMIT 1",
            OBJECT
        )

wp_kses(
                    $ct_result->comment,
                    array(
                        'a' => array(
                            'href'  => true,
                            'title' => true,
                        ),
                        'br'     => array(),
                        'p'     => array()
                    )
                )

wp_kses(
                        $ct_result->comment,
                        array(
                            'a' => array(
                                'href'  => true,
                                'title' => true,
                            ),
                            'br'     => array(),
                            'p'     => array()
                        )
                    )

wp_kses( "

Your request looks like spam.

{$ct_result->comment}

", array( 'a' => array( 'href' => true, 'title' => true, ), 'br' => array(), 'p' => array(), 'div' => array( 'id' => true, ), 'h1' => array(), ) )

wp_kses(
                        $echo_string,
                        array(
                            'a'   => array(
                                'href'  => true,
                                'title' => true,
                            ),
                            'br'  => array(),
                            'p'   => array(),
                            'div' => array(
                                'id'    => true,
                                'class' => true,
                                'style' => true
                            ),
                            'h3'  => array(),
                        )
                    )

wp_kses(
                                    $ct_result->comment,
                                    array(
                                        'a' => array(
                                            'href'  => true,
                                            'title' => true,
                                        ),
                                        'br'     => array(),
                                        'p'     => array(),
                                        'div' => array(
                                            'id' => true,
                                        ),
                                        'h1' => array(),
                                    )
                                )

wp_kses(
                    $ct_result->comment,
                    array(
                        'a' => array(
                            'href'  => true,
                            'title' => true,
                        ),
                        'br'     => array(),
                        'p'     => array()
                    )
                )
esc_html('Our service is not available in your region.')

$wpdb->prepare('
        SELECT 
            index_name AS index_name,
            COUNT(*) AS column_count
        FROM 
            information_schema.statistics
        WHERE 
            table_schema = %s AND
            table_name = %s AND
            index_name IN (
                SELECT index_name 
                FROM information_schema.statistics 
                WHERE column_name = \'id\'
            )
        GROUP BY 
            index_name;
    ', $wpdb->dbname, APBCT_TBL_SESSIONS)

wp_kses(
                $message,
                array(
                    'a' => array(
                        'href'  => true,
                        'title' => true,
                    ),
                    'br'     => array(),
                    'p'     => array()
                )
            )

$wpdb->prepare(
                    "
				SELECT DISTINCT YEAR( post_date ) AS year, MONTH( post_date ) AS month
				FROM $wpdb->posts
				WHERE post_type = %s
				$extra_checks
				ORDER BY post_date DESC
			",
                    $post_type
                )

$wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT option_value FROM {$wpdb->options} WHERE option_name = %s AND " . rand(1, 100000) . " > 0",
                $this->cron_option_name
            )

$wpdb->prepare(
            "INSERT INTO " . APBCT_TBL_SESSIONS . " (id, value, last_update)
            VALUES (%s, %s, %s) 
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 
                value = VALUES(value),
                last_update = %s",
            $data['id'],
            $data['value'],
            date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),
            date('Y-m-d H:i:s')
        )

$wpdb->prepare(
                'SELECT value FROM ' . APBCT_TBL_SESSIONS . ' WHERE id = %s',
                self::getID()
            )

$wpdb->prepare(
                'SELECT COUNT(id) FROM `' . $table . '` WHERE last_update < NOW() - INTERVAL %d SECOND;',
                APBCT_SEESION__LIVE_TIME
            )

$wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT user_id FROM $wpdb->usermeta WHERE meta_key = %s AND meta_value = %d;",
            self::USER_META_SIGN,
            1
        )
